implementation_summary.summary: CP00-875 closes the remaining RP29 relationship-map/model rows and opens the Commercial Readiness service-entrypoint foundation across RP29.P01.M06.S04-RP29.P02.M03.S14. It introduces descriptor-only policy and service matrices for request normalization, tenant/Matter prechecks, permission prechecks, audit hints, idempotency/lock rules, review-required routing, and blocked-claim outputs without CI/CD execution, deployment, persistence, permission decisions, audit writes, runtime receipts, real client data, credentials, or secrets.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-875 RP29.P01.M06.S04-RP29.P02.M03.S14 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
